PokerStars Hand #100000000003: Tournament #1000000003, €0.91+€0.09 EUR Hold'em No Limit - Level I (10/20) [ADM ID: TESTAAAA0003] - 2026/01/03 12:00:00 CET [2026/01/03 06:00:00 ET]
Table '1000000003 1' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 (200 in chips)
Seat 2: TestHero (300 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 (200 in chips)
TestHero: posts small blind 10
Villain2: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to TestHero [Ah Kd]
Villain1: raises 180 to 200 and is all-in
TestHero: raises 190 to 300 and is all-in
Villain2: calls 180 and is all-in
*** FLOP *** [2c 7s Td]
*** TURN *** [2c 7s Td] [5h]
*** RIVER *** [2c 7s Td 5h] [8c]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
TestHero: shows [Ah Kd] (high card Ace)
Villain1: shows [Qh Jh] (high card Queen)
Villain2: shows [3s 3d] (a pair of Threes)
TestHero collected 100 from side pot
TestHero collected 500 from main pot
Villain1 finished the tournament in 3rd place
Villain2 finished the tournament in 2nd place
TestHero wins the tournament and receives €2.00 - congratulations!
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 700 | Rake 0
Board [2c 7s Td 5h 8c]
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) showed [Qh Jh] and lost with high card Queen
Seat 2: TestHero (small blind) showed [Ah Kd] and won (600) with high card Ace
Seat 3: Villain2 (big blind) showed [3s 3d] and lost with a pair of Threes
